Home » People » Zutsuri » "Haze"

Haze

 
uploaded: Sun, Aug 6, 2017 @ 2:52 PM last modified: Sun, Aug 6, 2017 @ 2:56 PM  (add)
byZutsuri
length5:37
BPM97
Recommends
Recommends (22)
Stems from my song âHazeâ, featured on my album âFenâ. Listen here.

Cool, detached vocals.

Lyrics:

Lost again
Trying so hard to
Get high
High
Feeling low

Try to burn away
The last words that
She said
Knowing you can’t go
Back to her bed
Again

Sleepless nights and endless fights
You’re the one that she’s begun to

Love to hate
Yeah, she loves to hate you
Do you hate that you still love her?
Your favorite friend, your secret lover

Love to hate
Yeah, she loves to hate you
Do you hate that you still love her?
Cause you know you’re not above her
And you never were

High again
Losing sleep
And staying stoned
Stoned
Laying low

Try to fill your time
With girls that
Leave you cold
Knowing that
The game is growing old
Again

Sleepless nights and endless fights
You’re the one that she’s begun to

Love to hate
Yeah, she loves to hate you
Do you hate that you still love her?
Your favorite friend, your secret lover

Love to hate
Yeah, she loves to hate you
Do you hate that you still love her?
Cause you know you’re not above her
And you never were

The tension was thick as the air we couldn’t breathe
In the haze of the sleepless city where we didn’t sleep
It felt like so many other nights
We gazed at the dancing of a million lights
sample, media, bpm_095_100, preview, acappella, attribution, audio, mp3, 44k, stereo, VBR, archive, zip, synthesizer, female_vocals, electronic, experimental, trip_hop, vocals, dark, edgy, leslie, dance, pells, acapellas
